speaker: [player]
text: I don't know. This feels like it's building toward something intense.

speaker: Dirtus
text: That is the point. Good intense, though.

speaker: Mawla
text: [player] — you can set a limit. If at any point you want out, you say so and the Relay pauses.

speaker: Dirtus
text: ...Yes. Mawla's right. This only works if everyone actually wants to be here.

speaker: Vermia
text: Scatha does not want unwilling devotees. He's very clear on that. Chapter three of the Rhyme Journal.

speaker: [player]
text: Okay. I'll try it. One week at a time.
